description: Update the authenticated user's profile. Supports both standard ATProto profile fields and custom collection data.

main.description: Update profile fields in app.bsky.actor.profile or write to a custom profile collection.

collection.description: Optional custom collection NSID (e.g., app.grvty.actor.profile). Defaults to app.bsky.actor.profile.

record.description: Full record to write when using a custom collection. Ignored for app.bsky.actor.profile.
